body:
🎥 Session Recording Available – Hackathon 0
Fellows 💻🔥
Aaj ka session successfully complete ho chuka hai aur recording YouTube par upload kar di gayi hai.
⚡ Most Important Topic:
👉 .env file filling (Proper configuration step-by-step)
Agar aap Hackathon 0 ya Personal AI Employee project start kar rahe ho to ye part miss bilkul mat karein. .env galat hua to pura system kaam nahi karega ❌
🎥 Watch Recording Here:
👉 https://www.youtube.com/live/tfLThzveAbA?si=kEh0QJLEtt3i31dH
📢 Important:
Session me use hone wala prompt WhatsApp Channel par share kar diya gaya hai.
👉 Channel Follow Karein (Zaroori):
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VbBfUHuLY6cyC65tQR1T�
Serious builders hi follow karein 🚀🔥
